'''thozangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equestrial|equestrial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equestrial|equestrial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thozangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozangithi|thozangithi]] || [[word:thozangiji|thozangiji]] || [[word:thozangishi|thozangishi]] || [[word:thozangiki|thozangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozanguthuthu|thozanguthuthu]] || [[word:thozangujuju|thozangujuju]] || [[word:thozangushushu|thozangushushu]] || [[word:thozangukuku|thozangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozanguthu|thozanguthu]] || [[word:thozanguju|thozanguju]] || [[word:thozangushu|thozangushu]] || [[word:thozanguku|thozanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozangufthuf|thozangufthuf]] || [[word:thozangufjuf|thozangufjuf]] || [[word:thozangufshuf|thozangufshuf]] || [[word:thozangufkuf|thozangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozangethe|thozangethe]] || [[word:thozangeje|thozangeje]] || [[word:thozangeshe|thozangeshe]] || [[word:thozangeke|thozangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozangothotho|thozangothotho]] || [[word:thozangojojo|thozangojojo]] || [[word:thozangoshosho|thozangoshosho]] || [[word:thozangokoko|thozangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozangotho|thozangotho]] || [[word:thozangojo|thozangojo]] || [[word:thozangosho|thozangosho]] || [[word:thozangoko|thozangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozangofthof|thozangofthof]] || [[word:thozangofjof|thozangofjof]] || [[word:thozangofshof|thozangofshof]] || [[word:thozangofkof|thozangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfthĂŻf|thozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfjĂŻf|thozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfshĂŻf|thozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfkĂŻf|thozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thozangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thozangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thozangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thozangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfthĂŻf|thozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfjĂŻf|thozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfshĂŻf|thozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfkĂŻf|thozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfthĂŻf|thozangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfjĂŻf|thozangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfshĂŻf|thozangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thozangĂŻfkĂŻf|thozangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thozangĂŠthĂŠ|thozangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thozangĂŠjĂŠ|thozangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thozangĂŠshĂŠ|thozangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thozangĂŠkĂŠ|thozangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thozangathatha|thozangathatha]] || [[word:thozangajaja|thozangajaja]] || [[word:thozangashasha|thozangashasha]] || [[word:thozangakaka|thozangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozangatha|thozangatha]] || [[word:thozangaja|thozangaja]] || [[word:thozangasha|thozangasha]] || [[word:thozangaka|thozangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozangafthaf|thozangafthaf]] || [[word:thozangafjaf|thozangafjaf]] || [[word:thozangafshaf|thozangafshaf]] || [[word:thozangafkaf|thozangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thozangasha|thozangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozangshĂ«asha|thozangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozangroasha|thozangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozangmuasha|thozangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozangyaasha|thozangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozangnkshĂ«asha|gothozangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozangnkroasha|gothozangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozangnkmuasha|gothozangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozangnkyaasha|gothozangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thozazangasha|thozazangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozazangshĂ«asha|thozazangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozazangroasha|thozazangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozazangmuasha|thozazangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozazangyaasha|thozazangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozazangnkshĂ«asha|gothozazangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozazangnkroasha|gothozazangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozazangnkmuasha|gothozazangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozazangnkyaasha|gothozazangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thezĂŠngasha|thezĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thezĂŠngshĂ«asha|thezĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thezĂŠngroasha|thezĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thezĂŠngmuasha|thezĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thezĂŠngyaasha|thezĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothezĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gothezĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothezĂŠngnkroasha|gothezĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothezĂŠngnkmuasha|gothezĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothezĂŠngnkyaasha|gothezĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thozfangasha|thozfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thozfangshĂ«asha|thozfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thozfangroasha|thozfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thozfangmuasha|thozfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thozfangyaasha|thozfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothozfangnkshĂ«asha|gothozfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothozfangnkroasha|gothozfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothozfangnkmuasha|gothozfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothozfangnkyaasha|gothozfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
